---
title: "get_event_markets"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_event_markets()`

Get Event Markets

## Usage

```r
get_event_markets(
  event_ticker,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `event_ticker` | Character. The event ticker. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with market information for the event.

## Description

Retrieves all markets associated with a specific event.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
markets <- get_event_markets("KXHIGHNY-25FEB08")

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other events: 
`get_event()`,
`get_events()`
